description_long: This is a medium-sized, ancient-style ceramic vase with a single, thick handle and a wide, slightly flared rim. The exterior is adorned with intricate, dark brown painted motifs, including stylized animals, swirling lines, and plant-like elements, reminiscent of Greek or Mediterranean pottery. The surface has a slightly glossy finish, with visible brushwork and subtle textural irregularities that suggest handcrafting. The interior is unadorned, showing the natural clay color, while the rim features a lighter, patterned band. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the body, providing both decorative and functional value. Overall, the vase exudes an antique, artisanal charm suitable for decorative urban settings.
description: A medium-sized, ancient-style ceramic vase with a single handle and intricate dark brown painted motifs on a light brown base. The vase features a flared rim and a glossy, handcrafted finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick handle and a portion of the painted motifs, with the flared rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the animal motif and swirling patterns, with the handle partially visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more abstract and geometric motifs, with no handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another animal motif and the handle on the right, with detailed patterning.
